title: GSW — Right Chest
briefing: Patrol contact. Single casualty down behind cover. Took small-arms fire approximately 90 seconds ago. Pulled to CCP under suppressive fire.

casualty.mechanism: Single GSW, anterior right chest, 7.62mm suspected

injuries.notes: Penetrating wound, 4th intercostal space, mid-clavicular line. No exit wound located. Sucking sound on inspiration.
